title: Rhinanthus osiliensis
taxonomy: Rhinanthus osiliensis is classified within the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the broomrape family. This family consists of parasitic plants that obtain their nutrients by connecting to the vascular tissues of their host plants. Rhinanthus osiliensis is a species of flowering plant within the genus Rhinanthus. The genus Rhinanthus belongs to the order Lamiales, which includes a diverse group of flowering plants. As a member of the family Orobanchaceae, Rhinanthus osiliensis is also a part of the angiosperm clade.
